name: lumi-cloud-functions
description: Cloud Functions for Lumi Reading Diary

scripts.test:functions: npm run build && node --test test/notification.helpers.test.js test/parent_linking.helpers.test.js test/public_code_rate_limit.test.js test/dateUtils.test.js test/achievements.test.js test/access.test.js test/comprehension_retention.test.js test/deletion.helpers.test.js test/read_only_guard.test.js test/top_reader_award.test.js test/stats_noop.test.js test/class_daily_reading.test.js test/storage_usage.test.js test/streak_refresh.test.js test/term_dates_fallback.test.js test/ai_evaluation_fixtures.test.js test/ai_evaluation_enqueue.test.js test/ai_evaluation_provider.test.js test/ai_evaluation_worker.test.js test/ai_evaluation_retention.test.js test/ai_evaluation_report.test.js test/ai_eval_clip_review.test.js test/log_safety.test.js
scripts.test:rules:storage: JAVA_HOME="${JAVA_HOME:-/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home}" PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH" firebase emulators:exec --config ../firebase.deletion.json --only firestore,storage --project demo-lumi-rules-test "node --test test/storage.rules.test.js"
scripts.test:deletion:integration: npm run build && JAVA_HOME="${JAVA_HOME:-/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home}" PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH" firebase emulators:exec --config ../firebase.deletion.json --only firestore,auth,storage --project demo-lumi-deletion "node --test test/deletion.integration.test.js"
scripts.test:audio:integration: npm run build && JAVA_HOME="${JAVA_HOME:-/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home}" PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH" firebase emulators:exec --config ../firebase.deletion.json --only firestore,storage --project demo-lumi-audio "node --test test/comprehension_audio.integration.test.js"
scripts.test:audio:http: npm run build && JAVA_HOME="${JAVA_HOME:-/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home}" PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH" firebase emulators:exec --config ../firebase.deletion.json --only functions,firestore,storage,auth --project demo-lumi-audio-http "node --test test/comprehension_audio.http.integration.test.js"
scripts.test:audio:appcheck: npm run build && COMPREHENSION_AUDIO_APP_CHECK_ENFORCED=true JAVA_HOME="${JAVA_HOME:-/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home}" PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH" firebase emulators:exec --config ../firebase.deletion.json --only functions,auth --project demo-lumi-audio-appcheck "node --test test/comprehension_audio.appcheck.integration.test.js"
scripts.test:scale: npm run build && JAVA_HOME="${JAVA_HOME:-/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home}" PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH" firebase emulators:exec --config ../firebase.deletion.json --only firestore --project demo-lumi-scale "node --test test/dashboard_scale.integration.test.js"
scripts.test:summaries: npm run build && JAVA_HOME="${JAVA_HOME:-/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home}" PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH" firebase emulators:exec --config ../firebase.deletion.json --only firestore --project demo-lumi-daily-summary "node --test test/class_daily_reading.integration.test.js"
scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
